description: Canonical kill-switch triggers — codes are stable API surface for automation and rehearsals.

RUNTIME_CONSISTENCY_FAILURE.immediate_action_required: Halt trading; fix consistency artifacts; rehearse recovery before supervised resume.

ENV_FINGERPRINT_MISMATCH.immediate_action_required: Halt; reconcile process env with authoritative runtime artifacts; operator sign-off.

LOCK_EXCLUSIVITY_VIOLATION.immediate_action_required: Halt; release duplicate runners; verify single live authority.

FAILURE_STOP_VIOLATION.immediate_action_required: Halt; inspect failure model / streak; clear only after proof of stability.

STALE_INVALID_HALT_TRUTH.immediate_action_required: Fail-closed until halt truth reconciled with system_kill_switch + guard state.

CORRUPTED_STATE_ARTIFACTS.immediate_action_required: Halt; restore artifacts from known-good backup or regenerate under supervision.

REPEATED_EXECUTION_FAILURE_LOOP.immediate_action_required: Halt; triage venue/API; verify failsafe streak counters and order path.

MISSING_PROOF_ARTIFACTS_LIVE_PATH.immediate_action_required: Halt live path; refresh proofs; no autonomous trading until proven.

SUPABASE_DATABANK_WRITE_FAILURE_THRESHOL.immediate_action_required: Halt; restore databank health; verify sync probes before resume.

EXTREME_SLIPPAGE_THRESHOLD.immediate_action_required: Halt new entries; review venue depth and sizing; exits may still be allowed by policy.

FILL_ANOMALY.immediate_action_required: Halt; reconcile fills vs intent; inspect partial fill handling.

REPEATED_FAILED_ORDERS.immediate_action_required: Halt; inspect API errors and rate limits; verify credentials and product policy.

ABNORMAL_LATENCY.immediate_action_required: Halt; inspect network and venue latency; stabilize before resume.

LIQUIDITY_COLLAPSE.immediate_action_required: Halt entries; verify book depth and halts from intelligence layer.

INVALID_GATE_SELECTION.immediate_action_required: Halt; fix gate selection inputs; verify orchestration truth chain.

INVALID_EXECUTION_PARAMETERS.immediate_action_required: Halt; validate sizing, product, and mode flags.

CONFLICTING_GATE_SIGNALS.immediate_action_required: Halt; resolve signal conflicts; enforce single authority path.

CONFIDENCE_COLLAPSE.immediate_action_required: Halt new risk; review model inputs; optional if scoring not implemented.

HALT_TRUTH_READ_FAILURE.immediate_action_required: Fail-closed: cannot read halt truth — treat as unsafe; repair filesystem JSON.

MANUAL_OPERATOR_HALT.immediate_action_required: Review incident; clear through recovery_engine with explicit operator signal.
